---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-band">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="row align-items-center g-5">
      <div class="col-md-auto text-center">
        <!-- Swap in your photo: <img src="images/headshot.jpg" class="profile-photo" alt="Dr. Andrew Anderson"> -->
        <div class="profile-placeholder mx-auto" style="font-size:0.75rem;">
          📷<br>Add your<br>headshot here
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col">
        <h1 style="font-size:2.6rem; color:#3c5c3e; line-height:1.15; margin-bottom:0.2rem;">
          Dr. Andrew Anderson
        </h1>
        <p style="font-family:Arial,sans-serif; font-size:1rem; color:#6e7d8a; margin-bottom:1.1rem;">
          Extension Economist &amp; Associate Professor · [University Name]
        </p>
        <p style="max-width:560px;">
          I study the economics of livestock production in the western United States, with a focus
          on beef cattle markets, rangeland management, and risk management tools for cow-calf and
          stocker operators. My extension program delivers practical economic analysis directly to
          producers, lenders, and industry stakeholders across the region.
        </p>
        <div class="mb-3">
          <span class="tag">Beef Cattle Markets</span>
          <span class="tag">Rangeland Economics</span>
          <span class="tag">Livestock Risk Management</span>
          <span class="tag">Western Agricultural Policy</span>
          <span class="tag">Farm & Ranch Finance</span>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:4px;">
          <a href="work.qmd" class="btn-sage">Research &amp; Extension</a>
          <a href="cv.pdf" class="btn-outline">Download CV</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## About

<span class="section-label">Background</span>
<div class="rule-accent"></div>

I am an extension economist and associate professor in the Department of [Agricultural & Applied Economics] at [University Name]. My work centers on the economics of livestock systems across the Intermountain West and Great Plains — from cow-calf enterprise budgeting and stocker market analysis to federal grazing policy and drought impacts on ranch viability.

Before joining [University Name], I completed my Ph.D. at [University], where my dissertation examined [topic]. I was raised on a [cattle/ranch] operation in [State], and that practical background shapes how I approach both my research and my extension work.

::: {.row .mt-4 .g-4}
::: {.col-md-4}

### Research Focus

- Cattle market price dynamics and basis
- Livestock Risk Protection (LRP) insurance effectiveness
- Rangeland lease markets and carrying capacity
- Drought economics and herd liquidation decisions
- Federal lands grazing economics

:::
::: {.col-md-4}

### Extension Work

- Cow-calf and stocker enterprise budgets
- Cattle market outlook publications
- Ranch financial management workshops
- LRP premium calculators and decision tools

:::
::: {.col-md-4}

### Contact

**Email:** [andrewemeryanderson@gmail.com](mailto:andrewemeryanderson@gmail.com)
**Office:** [Building], Room [###]
**Phone:** [(###) ###-####]
**Office Hours:** [Days/Times]

[Google Scholar](#) · [ORCID](#)

:::
:::
